name: Sesame Chicken Nuggets with Oven Roasted Potatoes
recipeIngredient: 1 Pound Boneless Skinless Chicken Breasts, Cubed 1.25 inches
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Marinate chicken in the marinade for one hour.
3. Mix bread crumbs and sesame seeds.
4. Remove chicken from marinade; let excess drip off.
5. Dip chicken pieces into the bread crumb mixture and spray a baking pan with oil, wiping off excess.
6. Place chicken nuggets on a baking sheet and bake for 20 minutes or until golden brown.
7. Peel potatoes and cut into 1.5-inch strips to resemble fat french fries.
8. Toss potatoes with olive oil, garlic powder, and salt.
9. Spray another baking pan with oil and wipe off excess.
10. Place potato strips in a single layer on the pan and bake at 400°F for 40 minutes or until crisp on the outside and tender on the inside.
